(b)
Binu earns?
R20,000
per month. She spends 35,000
 on rent
5,0o0 on food, and 2,0o0 on other expenses every r
month.
What is the amount Binu will
I save by the end of a year?
(c)
During the daytime a snail climbs 3 cm up a post, and during
the night while asleep, accidentally slips down by 2 cm. The
post is 10 cm high, and a delicious treat is on its top. In how
days will the snail
Kue
get the treat?
